backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko backend actor with no implemented logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented game features (auto-chess loop, unit roster, synergy system, etc.) to their corresponding source files and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short descriptions of frontend source files, reflecting a mix of an ecosystem simulation and a quiz app rather than the current auto-chess game.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div; title is set in Chinese for an ecosystem sandbox simulation game.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in a ThemeProvider and renders Header, Quiz, Footer, and Toaster — currently wired to a quiz app layout.
frontend/src/components/AnimalMesh.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/BattleBoard.tsx: Renders the 8×4 auto-chess battle board with drag-and-drop and click-based unit placement, phase indicator, floating damage display, and separate friendly/enemy halves.
frontend/src/components/Bench.tsx: Displays the player's bench of up to 8 units with drag-to-board support, sell buttons during preparation phase, and empty slot indicators.
frontend/src/components/ControlPanel.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/EgyptianPanel.ts: Reusable Egyptian-themed UI panel component with decorative corner borders, an optional title bar with icon, and compact/normal size variants.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/GameHUD.tsx: Top HUD bar showing game title, current round, player HP with a color-coded progress bar, gold count, and a prep-phase timer with a start-combat button.
frontend/src/components/GameScene.tsx: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/GridTile.tsx: Individual board cell component that handles drag-over, drop, and click events with visual states for enemy territory, drag validity, and occupancy.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders the app header with a monitor icon, title 'Middle School ICT Quiz', and a subtitle.
frontend/src/components/HowToPlayModal.t: A dialog modal that explains the rules of Pharaoh's Conquest auto-chess game across six sections covering preparation, combat, synergies, economy, win conditions, and tips.
frontend/src/components/Quiz.tsx: Implements a multi-type ICT quiz (multiple-choice, true/false, matching) for middle schoolers with scoring, progress tracking, topic filtering, and a results screen.
frontend/src/components/Shop.tsx: Renders the in-game shop panel for Pharaoh's Conquest, displaying purchasable units as UnitCards with buy buttons and a gold-costing refresh button, enabled only during the preparation phase.
frontend/src/components/SynergyPanel.tsx: Displays active and inactive faction synergies on the board, showing unit counts, threshold indicators, and bonus descriptions using data from the synergy calculator and definitions.
frontend/src/components/UnitCard.tsx: Renders a compact unit card with portrait image, tier stars, HP bar, faction badges, cost badge, sell button, drag support, and a hover tooltip showing ability details.
frontend/src/components/UnitSprite.tsx: Renders a game unit as a positioned sprite with HP bar, portrait image, tier stars, name label, and supports selection, drag, attack, and death animations.
frontend/src/data/synergies.ts: Defines all synergy/faction bonuses (e.g., Priest, Warrior, Nomad) with thresholds and bonus descriptions for the game's synergy system.
frontend/src/data/units.ts: Defines all unit definitions (stats, factions, abilities, portrait paths) for the Egyptian-themed auto-battler game.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, handling both authenticated and anonymous access and invalidating dependent queries on actor change.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameState.tsx: React context and hook providing the full game state management including board/bench units, shop generation, enemy spawning, combat ticking, synergy calculation, and gold economy for the auto-battler game.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing login/logout state, AuthClient creation, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file with no exports, noting that all game state is managed frontend-only with no backend queries needed.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Egyptian-themed Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines a custom Egyptian color palette with utility classes for gold, turquoise, and papyrus styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/types/game.ts: TypeScript type definitions for the game, including factions, game phases, unit structures (board, bench, shop), synergies, combat events, and the overall GameState interface.
frontend/src/utils/combatEngine.ts: Combat simulation engine that processes per-tick attacks for friendly and enemy units, applies synergy buffs, calculates damage and crits, and returns updated unit states with combat events.
frontend/src/utils/goldEconomy.ts: Utility functions for calculating gold income per round, interest on held gold, total income, and unit sell values.
frontend/src/utils/synergyCalculator.ts: Calculates active faction synergies from board units and converts them into numeric combat buffs (attack, armor, speed, regen, etc.) used by the combat engine.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with Egyptian custom colors, Cinzel/Crimson font families, oklch-based design tokens, and custom box shadows, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state, version, feature list, architectural notes, and image requirements for an auto-chess game with an ancient Egyptian theme. Defines existing features, synergies, UI, and known issues.
